productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Cherokee Black Grey Sandal
description: Get ready to float in comfort with these Cherokee floaters from adidas. Comfortable yet sturdy, these sandals will perform just as well on everyday walks in the park or a stretch of wild terrain on an adventure trek.UpperErgonomically designed synthetic upper with forefoot, front ankle and ankle collar straps with velcro fasteners for easy adjustment to attain a snug FitElasticated piping on the sides of the straps for better flexibilityMesh inserts on the sides for better breathabilityLightly cushioned lining for greater comfortUnique collar with four-strip velcro fasteners that can be detatched from the main sandal for added style, usage and comfortHeat transfer logo on the forefoot strapIconic three stripes on the ankle strapMidsoleCushioned footbed with slightly elevated interlocking triangle design for soft massage feel and all day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional lugs on forefoot and heel for durabilityRidge pattern for superior tractionFlex grooves for natural movement of the feetWash careRub surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
